modmenu.description.obsidianesp: Highlights obsidian and reinforced blocks for servers.
text.autoconfig.obsidianesp.title: ObsidianESP Settings
text.autoconfig.obsidianesp.option.scanR: The radius of the block search. Higher values increase CPU load.
text.autoconfig.obsidianesp.option.updat: Delay between scans in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second). Higher values improve FPS.
